primary_function: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
suggested_aec_gates: Verify typography choices avoid Inter, Roboto, and Arial fonts
Confirm output avoids purple gradients on white backgrounds
Ensure code includes working HTML/CSS/JavaScript implementation
Validate presence of distinctive aesthetic direction in design
Verify animations use CSS-only solutions or appropriate motion libraries
Confirm color scheme uses CSS variables for consistency
Ensure layout breaks away from predictable grid patterns
Verify background includes atmospheric effects beyond solid colors
Confirm implementation complexity matches aesthetic ambition level
trigger_text: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality.
